info.name: Helprr External Platform APIs (Dependency Map)
info.description:
Postman collection for **external APIs used by Helprr** (not Helprr internal routes).

Coverage includes Sonarr, Radarr, qBittorrent, Prowlarr, Jellyfin, TMDB, and AniList.
Organized in two ways:
1) By Helprr tab/feature (Dashboard, Series, Movies, Activity, Calendar, Torrents, Discover, Anime, Prowlarr, Jellyfin, Settings, Polling)
2) Complete catalog by service

Tip: Run qBittorrent login request first to populate `qbittorrent_sid`.
For TMDB, use `tmdb_api_key` query auth by default; optional bearer token header is provided disabled.

item.name: 01 - Dashboard Tab

item.description: External APIs powering dashboard widgets, service status, and quick stats.

item.name: 03 - Movies Tab
item.description: Movie flows (Radarr core + TMDB enrichment for detail/credits pages).

item.name: 04 - Activity Tab
item.description: Queue/history/wanted/manual-import dependencies shown in Activity screens.

item.name: 06 - Torrents Tab
item.description: All external qBittorrent APIs used by Torrent list/detail/control pages.

item.name: 08 - Anime Tab
item.description: Anime explore/detail/library dependencies (AniList GraphQL + Sonarr/Radarr matching).

item.name: 09 - Prowlarr Tab
item.description: Indexer management, status, history, schema, and command APIs.
